2 For he walked in the ways of the kings of Israel, and made also molten images for Baalim.
Neither walked they in the ways of God’s commandments, Nor trod in the paths of discipline in his righteousness.
2 For he walked in the ways of the kings of Israel, and made also molten images for Baalim.
Ahaz, king of Judah, (735-715 BC) who made molten images for Baalim and offered child sacrifice and burning incense in the high places (2 Chronicles 28:2-4, 23-25; 2 Kings 16:2-4, 10-16).
2 For he walked in the ways of the kings of Israel, and made also molten images for Baalim.

who practise sorcery, and the power of witchcraft, and the power of those who make molten images

13 And said unto them, Ye shall not bring in the captives hither; for whereas we have offended against the Lord already, ye intend to add ‘more to our sins and to our trespass; for our trespass is great, and there is fierce wrath against Isracl.

the villages thereof. Lit. the ‘daughters thereof’, a Hebraism; the ‘land of Jazer’ was a fertile region with villages dependent upon the city; see Num, xxxii. 1; Isa. xvi. 8; Jer. xlviil. 32.
